title: midnight-craving egyptian sugar snap peas tagine
description: a bitter and juicy egyptian dish featuring sugar snap peas, yuzu-cure, and a blend of spices, perfect for a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: yuzu juice
ingredients.notes: for curing the sugar snap peas

instructions: heat the olive oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the ground coriander, cumin, and paprika, and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the sugar snap peas, kosher salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
cure the sugar snap peas with the yuzu juice for at least 30 minutes.
add the cured sugar snap peas to the tagine or Dutch oven, and stir to combine.
cook for 10-15 minutes, until the sugar snap peas are tender and slightly caramelized.
season with lemon juice to taste.
serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
